hair-color-style.description: Transform your look with premium hair coloring and styling in Bhopal. From balayage to global color, our expert stylists have you covered.

hair-straightening-keratin.description: Get smooth, frizz-free, and shiny hair with professional Keratin, Botox, and Rebonding treatments at Nikky Bawa Salon in Bhopal.

hair-extension.title: Premium Hair Extensions | Nikky Bawa Salon Bhopal
hair-extension.description: Instantly add volume and length to your hair with natural-looking, high-quality extensions safely applied by experts in Bhopal.

facial.title: Rejuvenating Facials & Skin Care | Nikky Bawa Salon
facial.description: Restore your skin's natural glow with our advanced facials, including Hydra-Facial, anti-aging, and acne treatments in Bhopal.

nails.title: Nail Art, Manicure & Pedicure | Nikky Bawa Salon Bhopal

hair-removal.title: Painless Waxing & Hair Removal | Nikky Bawa Salon
hair-removal.description: Experience smooth skin with our hygienic Rica and Chocolate waxing services. Painless hair removal by trained professionals in Bhopal.
